label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about the main aim of the dance project mentioned in the passage. The options are A to D. First, I need to recall the details from the text. The project is run by the Rebecca Davis Dance Company in Rwanda, teaching dance to street children. The passage mentions that the children have lost their families, some have been in prison, others sold their bodies. The dance classes provide structured learning and self-expression they haven't had before. Rebecca Davis thought dance could get them off the street into a safe place. She believes learning to dance is a step toward education. After learning to attend classes and follow directions, they can take IT classes. Also, the best students get scholarships to a boarding school. So, looking at the options: A is parental care, but the text doesn't say they provide parents. B is scholarships, but that's part of the program, not the main aim. C is help receive education, which aligns with the step toward education
